item.name: Fishy Shark
item.description:
A large shark that, despite its size, prefers living among the reeds of the One River.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Grass sharks of this subspecies are speculated to be close cousins─or at least good friends─of the Namazu. Though its behavior may engender suspicion, the fishy shark's tendency to linger amid the vegetation of the riverbed arises from a fondness for scratching its hide against the verdure rather than more sinister motives.
